original_image_tags: Official seal of the Department of Justice / Federal Bureau of Investigation in the upper left corner.

elements.description: A circular Department of Justice seal in the top left corner. Below the seal is a small typed label reading 'In Reply, Please Refer to File No.'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a Department of Justice seal in the top left corner, but B adds a specific text label that A does not mention, with no direct contradiction.
